subject: docs: update all documentation for mobile UX session changes
body:
Retroactive doc updates for all work done in this session — should
have been updated incrementally after each commit per CLAUDE.md process.

- SESSION_NOTES.md: Added 2026-03-27 section with all changes
- HISTORY.md: Added 2026-03-27 entry
- USER_GUIDE.md: Added Header, Quick Guide, Pagination sections
- TESTING_GUIDE.md: Added test scenarios for hamburger menu, quick
  guide, header subtitle, and pagination
- CLAUDE.md: Updated architecture lists with new components/hooks
- AI_MISTAKES.md: Documented skipped process/docs violation

Tags: documentation
